hero.hero_overview:
Luo Yi is a mage na super strong when it comes to crowd control and team fights. Hindi siya yung typical na mage na puro damage lang, ang strength niya talaga is yung combo ng skills niya using Yin and Yang. Basically, kapag natamaan mo yung enemies with opposite marks, magsi-stun sila, which is sobrang useful lalo na pag dikit-dikit yung kalaban.

Medyo skill-based si Luo Yi, so kailangan marunong ka mag-position at mag-timing ng skills. Hindi siya ganun ka-easy gamitin sa una, pero once ma-gets mo yung mechanics niya, ang satisfying niya gamitin kasi kaya mong baguhin yung flow ng team fight.

Yung ultimate niya is teleport, which is super useful for rotations, ambush, or kahit pang-escape. Pwede mong dalhin yung teammates mo to a specific location, kaya ang lakas niya for surprise plays and map control.
hero.hero_strength:
Hero Strength
📍Malakas sa Team Fights: 
Kapag nagsama-sama yung kalaban, advantage mo yun. Isang combo mo lang, pwede mo silang ma-stun lahat.

📍Good Crowd Control: 
Yung Yin-Yang effect niya can disrupt enemies easily, lalo na pag nagkakagulo na sa clash.

📍High Burst Damage:
Hindi lang control, masakit din damage niya lalo na pag kumpleto combo mo 

📍Map Control (Ultimate): Yung teleport niya gives your team advantage—pang-gank, pang-rotate, or pang-set up ng plays.
Punishes Poor Positioning: Pag dikit-dikit kalaban or mali pwesto nila, madali mo silang maparusahan.
hero.hero_weakness:
📍Madaling Ma-pick Off: 
Wala siyang dash or escape skill (aside sa ulti na may delay), so pag nahuli ka, delikado ka agad.

📍Positioning Dependent: 
Kailangan maayos pwesto mo lagi. Isang mali lang, pwede kang ma-burst ng kalaban.

📍Skill-Dependent: 
Hindi siya beginner-friendly. Kailangan marunong ka mag-manage ng marks (Yin & Yang) para maging effective.

📍Weak Against Mobile Heroes: 
Yung mga hero na mabilis gumalaw or may dash, mahirap tamaan ng combo mo.

📍Needs Team Coordination: 
Mas nagiging effective siya pag marunong makisabay team mo, lalo na sa paggamit ng ultimate.

spell.spell_desc:
I recommend using Flicker as your main spell since Luo Yi doesn’t have any built-in mobility. It helps you reposition easily, escape dangerous situations, or even pull off unexpected combos during team fights.

You can also use Purify if you’re facing enemies with a lot of crowd control. It allows you to remove debuffs and continue casting your skills safely, especially in crucial clashes.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Tigreal is the most effective partner for Luo Yi because his ability to gather multiple enemies into a single spot provides the ideal setup for her Yin Yang reactions to hit several targets at once. His consistent crowd control ensures that opponents remain stationary long enough for her explosive damage and secondary pulls to trigger repeatedly during a single engage.

Atlas serves as another premier choice for a roaming companion due to his powerful initiation and grouping mechanics. He can easily pull high mobility targets together which allows Luo Yi to focus her skills on a concentrated area to maximize her damage and stun duration while he absorbs the brunt of the enemy retaliation.

Ruby excels alongside Luo Yi by providing continuous displacement and area of effect control that keeps enemies clustered. Her short cooldown skills perfectly match the rhythm of Luo Yi mark cycling making it difficult for opponents to escape the constant chain of stuns and pulls produced by their combined efforts.

counters.counter_desc: Diggie serves as a primary strategic counter because his ultimate ability provides a massive area of effect cleanse and shield for his entire team. This effectively negates the most dangerous part of Luo Yi kit by allowing his allies to walk through her pulls and stuns without being displaced or interrupted during critical moments.

Gusion poses a severe threat to Luo Yi because his high burst damage and swift dash mechanics allow him to close the distance before she can effectively react. He can easily navigate around her skill shots and eliminate her in a matter of seconds before she has the opportunity to build up her passive shield or movement speed boost.

Lolita is a significant counter to Luo Yi because her second skill can reflect the Dispersion projectile which is the foundation of Luo Yi damage and crowd control. By timing her shield correctly Lolita can block the initial mark from being applied or even reflect the energy back toward Luo Yi and her allies potentially triggering a reaction against the user.

Eudora serves as a classic burst counter to Luo Yi because of her ability to secure an instant kill using a simple point and click combo. Since Luo Yi is a squishy mage with no immediate escape skills she is extremely vulnerable to being caught by Eudora ball lightning stun which prevents her from casting any defensive marks or shields.

Harley is an exceptionally dangerous opponent for Luo Yi because his high mobility and poke potential allow him to strike from unexpected angles. He can use his Space Escape ability to blink forward and apply his Deadly Magic ultimate which marks Luo Yi for a massive burst of delayed damage. Since Luo Yi lacks any blink skills she cannot easily distance herself from Harley card throws or escape the range of his explosion. His ability to instantly blink back to his original hat location ensures that he can execute his burst combo and retreat safely before she has the chance to retaliate with a Yin Yang reaction.

Hayabusa represents a significant threat to Luo Yi because of his superior mobility and ability to become untargetable during his ultimate. He can utilize his Quad Shadow to quickly close the gap from a safe distance and bypass any protective marks or area of effect spells she attempts to cast. Once he activates Ougi Shadow Kill he delivers multiple strikes of physical damage while remaining completely immune to her Yin Yang pulls or stuns. Since Luo Yi relies on hitting her targets to generate a defensive shield she is left defenseless against his burst damage and often cannot survive the duration of his assault without the assistance of a teammate or high physical defense items. Best to buy winter crown in this case.

dominants.dominant_desc: Strategic success with Luo Yi depends first on mastering her early game lane pressure. During the laning phase focus on using the splash damage from Dispersion to mark enemies and trigger Yin Yang reactions for significant poke damage. Proper positioning is vital so stay behind frontline allies to safely cycle through marks while maintaining a distance that allows you to react to enemy movements.

In the mid to late game utilize the Diversion ultimate to orchestrate unexpected team rotations or to bypass enemy vision for objective steals. When transitioning into team fights prioritize targeting clustered enemies to maximize the impact of area of effect displacement and burst damage. Maintaining high situational awareness allows for the effective use of your kit to peel for vulnerable teammates or to execute decisive flanks that catch the opposing backline out of position.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Luo Yi benefits significantly from the Custom Mage Emblem because it provides essential magic power and magic penetration to maximize her explosive potential. The Inspire talent is selected to gain extra cooldown reduction which allows for more frequent casting of Dispersion charges and faster trigger of Yin Yang reactions during prolonged engagements.
Incorporating Wilderness Blessing is a professional strategic choice that increases your movement speed in the river and jungle areas facilitating faster rotations between lanes to support allies. This mobility ensures you can arrive at skirmishes before your opponents and find the perfect flanking positions for your ultimate. For the core talent Lethal Ignition is the superior option because it deals additional adaptive damage when you hit an enemy multiple times within a short duration. Since Luo Yi naturally hits enemies several times with her skill combos she can easily trigger this burn effect to secure kills on targets who might otherwise survive with low health.

equips.equip_desc:
This equipment set is designed to maximize Luo Yi burst potential while addressing her high mana requirements and cooldown needs. Arcane Boots provide essential early game magic penetration to ensure your Yin Yang reactions deal significant damage against durable opponents. Enchanted Talisman is the core utility item of this build providing massive mana regeneration and cooldown reduction so you can maintain a constant barrage of skills without depleting your resources.
The combination of Glowing Wand and Lightning Truncheon serves as the primary damage engine for this set. Glowing Wand applies a continuous burn effect that scales with the enemy health while Lightning Truncheon provides explosive area of effect damage that triggers perfectly with Luo Yi displacement mechanics. To ensure effectiveness against late game targets Divine Glaive offers the necessary magic penetration to cut through magic defense items. Finally Holy Crystal provides a massive boost to your total magic power scaling your overall damage to its absolute peak for decisive team fight impact.

hero.hero_overview: Luo Yi is a control mage who uses the balance of Yin and Yang to deal area damage and crowd control through skill reactions. She is mainly played in the mid lane where she can clear waves quickly and rotate to other lanes. Her abilities allow her to control enemy movement during fights and apply pressure across the map using her ultimate which enables instant team repositioning and surprise plays.
hero.hero_strength: Luo Yi excels in team fights due to her strong area damage and crowd control when Yin and Yang effects react. She is especially effective in tight spaces where enemies are grouped together. Her ultimate gives her strong map presence by enabling fast rotations ganks and objective control. She becomes more impactful as the game progresses and can easily punish enemies who are poorly positioned or unaware of her skill range.
hero.hero_weakness: Luo Yi has low mobility and can be easily punished if she is caught out of position. She depends heavily on accurate skill usage and good timing to trigger her reactions effectively. Burst damage heroes and assassins can eliminate her quickly if she is isolated. Poor map awareness or mistimed ultimate usage can greatly reduce her overall impact in a match.

data.recommend: Master Luo Yi Yin Yang mechanics with this comprehensive guide. Optimize your burst damage strategic rotations and team fight positioning to dominate the midlane and secure victory.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker serves as the optimal battle spell for Luo Yi to compensate for a lack of inherent mobility and provide essential survivability against high threat targets. This tool is critical for repositioning during volatile team fights allowing the user to adjust combat angles to ensure the successful activation of Yin Yang reactions. Utilized with precision Flicker functions as both a defensive mechanism for evading sudden ganks and an aggressive utility for executing surprise engagement rotations. Mastering the timing of this spell significantly enhances presence on the battlefield by securing both individual safety and the ability to dictate the flow of combat.

data.title: JASVER

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Even in bad situations Luo-Yi can tank and dish damage, leaving enemies under 50% hp and leaving the crumbs for Karina to pick up
Same thing for Martis
A support will make Luo-Yi nearly unkillable
Nova can dish good damage and Luo-Yi tank and can keep them far.

They work well in teamfights, Luo tanks and provides cc while Chang'e becomes a machine gun.

Or plan B, diversion. Luo-Yi will hold up in teamfights or provides distracting while Chang'e can push.

Luo-Yi can open a portal for Chang'e to an enemy lane with minions

counters.counter_desc: Esmeralda will counter Luo-Yi's shield gain but in teamfights shell hold out well against Esme.

Level one Luo-Yi can land different sigils on the dog and the boy, effective annoyance lol

Luo-Yi can easily mark Popol by landing an S1 on the dog, his dog isn't really protecting him in those cases.

Vengeance and balded armour will also disable him effectively.
It's hard to land skills on Irithiel for Luo-Yi.
The true damage will quasi disable the concept of tank Luo
My favourite matchup, I can't explain
They need to stay grouped for Estes to heal them, right?

dominants.dominant_desc:
I especially take her to Gold lane(Glory-Immo) but mid is good too if your mm is not a sh*thead

Early you may play safe, try to land double stun combos on your counterpart. Or Gradually poke, lower their hp until you can land a double stun combo to finish them. 

During turtle you can use your ultimate to help on turtle, but be careful to not lose towers. If you brought clock of destiny already then focus tanking for your teammates. You'll see Luo-Yi can tank quite well and if your team can dish some damage it's perfect.

Mid game you'll start becoming a threat, enemies will underestimate your ability to sustain.

In teamfights you can do miracles, early to late. Even full tanks the damage is very balanced, trust me
Yo unkillable and still deal damage.

emblems.emblem_desc: It might seem like a scam but it's perfect.

equips.equip_desc:
Stats when items passive are stacked  : —7710 hp—452 magic power—320 physical defense—210magic defense. 4.2k damage per combo.

You will not need boots, it's a waste of 720 gold in early game.

Clock of destiny is my Luo's core item, provides mana but the passive is Destiny is especially useful because you can stack it in syncs with Luo's passive. 

Ice queen wand because the 7% mov speed and the 10% spellvamp benefits her, and the passive benefits her allies too—orovide a stronger control effect in teamfights.

Dominance ice, I know some people would say Burning wand is better but we are going for a sustain Luo-Yi who is able to go on the frontline, especially when you don't have a support, squishy mm and an assassin jgl. You can rush ice Dom before ice queen wand.

Guardian helmet, I suggest to build it when the enemy team have constant big damage dishing heroes (Lesley, Clint, Martis, Eudora, Cecilion, Saber, Arlott etc) Guardian helmet will cancel Martis Ultimate and will let your survive with 2% hp after Harley's ultimate.

Bladed Armor is only worth buying if the enemy has attack speed heroes, else it can be replaced by Antique cuirass.

Last item can be changed, Holy crystal is priori when your team lacks danage—it also benefits Luo-Yi's passive shields.

If the enemy has constant magic damage , it would be wise to buy radiant armor instead.(Alice, Novaria, Nathan, Lylia, Silvanna) Especially since you'll get the focus because you look defenceless.
Sometimes Concentrated energy is good too.

I haven't been use queen's wings in a while but its good. You can always adjust the build based on enemy comp but these are the defaults I suggest to go with.

This build grants you: —9960 hp—105 magic pw—260 physical def—390magic defense and 65% damage reduction when vengeance and queens wing activated.

hero.hero_overview:
I know Luo-Yi is a mage and she is supposed to be played with magic damage ! But there are always possibilities that I'm willing you people to try
I've been playing a sustain Luo-Yi for a while, especially on gold lane in solo q, the random mm we get is usually questionable and imo Luo-Yi was a good replacement as long she can deal w the mm

My Luo-Yi will tank for you, provide as a frontline and provide cc and unexpected damage.

Prolly sounding like a scammer but you can never know before you try ;) Good luck!

spell.spell_desc: Vengeance is my favourite spell for Luo-Yi, it's especially useful against attack speed heroes if you build bladed armor. It's the perfect spell against any comp.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Laning Tips
Stay in mid-lane to maximize map control and assist side lanes
Use skill combos to harass enemies and maintain lane pressure
Position safely behind minions to avoid enemy ganks

Team Fight Strategies
Use Diversion to reposition your team or create surprise attacks
Focus on placing Yin Yang Overturn in choke points for maximum AOE damage
Prioritize crowd-controlling enemy damage dealers using her passive stun
Stay in the backline and use long-range skills to support your team without overextending
dominants.dominant_title: Focus on controlling mid-lane by clearing minion waves with AOE skills Use her Duality passive to trigger stuns and zone out enemies Play safe maintain distance and avoid unnecessary fights

emblems.emblem_desc:
I chose Mage Emblem with Inspire, Mystery Shop, and Impure Rage for Luo Yi because:
	1.	Inspire: Reduces cooldown, allowing her to use skills more frequently.
	2.	Mystery Shop: Lowers item costs, helping her get core items faster.
	3.	Impure Rage: Adds extra damage and mana regen, keeping her effective in fights.

This setup maximizes her burst damage, skill uptime, and early-game power.

equips.equip_desc:
Arcane Boots gives Magic Penetration and mobility
Necklace of Durance reduces enemy healing and boosts Magic Power
Lightning Truncheon adds burst AOE damage and increases Magic Power
Genius Wand enhances Magic Penetration and reduces enemy magic defense
Holy Crystal greatly increases Magic Power for higher damage
Oracle boosts survivability with HP Magic Defense and HP regen

This build maximizes AOE damage and crowd control counters healing heroes and balances damage and survivability

hero.hero_overview: Luo Yi is a Mage who harnesses the power of Yin and Yang, allowing her to deal massive magic damage while also providing excellent crowd control. Her Diversion skill lets her and her teammates teleport to a different location on the map, making her a valuable asset for strategic plays and surprise attacks. She excels in team fights, where her abilities can disable multiple enemies at once.
hero.hero_strength:
Strong crowd control due to Yin-Yang reaction.
	High magic burst damage when abilities are used correctly.
	Diversion (Ultimate Skill) allows fast repositioning and surprise attacks.
	Excels in team fights, disrupting enemies and controlling the battlefield.
hero.hero_weakness:
Lacks escape abilities if Flicker is not available.
	Requires precise timing and positioning to maximize skills.
	Weak in 1v1 fights against high-damage or mobile heroes.
	Highly dependent on proper positioning in battles.

data.recommend: A complete guide for Luo Yi, covering the best item builds, tips, and the most effective ways to use her skills!

spell.spell_desc: Flicker is the best choice for Luo Yi as she lacks mobility. It allows her to reposition quickly during fights or escape from dangerous situations. Use it to dodge enemy attacks or to chase down low-health enemies.

data.title: Luo Yi: Master of Yin & Yang

hero.hero_overview: Lou yi a great mage with a great AoE control and mobility, an ally and follower of great black dragon
hero.hero_strength: Louyi exceeds in AoE CC and burst damage with the new items she can push her strengths to it outmost power
hero.hero_weakness: Thou, she's reliable to heroes that can protect her and keeping enemies stick together, she can have her hard times hitting enemies with her skills

spell.spell_desc: Flicker for escape

cooperates.cooperate_desc: The best teamfight combination to ambush enemies.
Best for eliminating enemies at once.
Of course fellow crowd control will be perfect.

counters.counter_desc: His ultimate is annoying.

dominants.dominant_desc: At the start of the game, take skill 1. Help the jungle (Attack the buff with skill 1 1× only) then continue to clean the mid minions. Pay attention to the situation if you can rotate with roamers or disturb enemy jungler. At minute 1:45 go to exp lane and clear lane with explaner. Give your mid minions to the roamer until minute 2 so he can gain lv 4 to war at the turtle. At this situation be careful, Don't get kidnapped by the enemy.
Focus on the objective (lord, turent), don't die. Take advantage of the winter crown in combo with the ultimate to escape. Do not panic.

emblems.emblem_desc: With this emblem composition, you can scare the enemy with painful damage and avoid enemy ambush attacks well. When stealing a lord, you have a chance to riot or run to get away from the enemy.

equips.equip_desc: The book is a must (This mage's energy is quite easy to wasteful), buy the raw shoes first (brown shoe), then buy raw book (the form of a blue necklace). After that you can focus making the book and complete the other equipment. Glowing wand can reduce enemy healing power and giving a burn effect.
If there's no healer or heroes that have a high lifesteal, you can use this build. This build has more painful magic damage to enemies.

hero.hero_overview: A strong mage for team fight. She can survive for a while to close range hero opponents, but still important to keep your distance while using it.
hero.hero_strength: High damage and crowd control especially in the late game. Can turn things around with his ultimate as long as it is used correctly.
hero.hero_weakness: Need a lot mana, and skill 1 has a passive stack that must be played well so that isn't wasted.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker is very useful to change the situation. Especially this hero can only escape with her ultimate where the coldown takes quite a while. With flicker, you can keep your distance better too.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Diggie is a perfect companion for lou yi. Since diggie has a flexible skill both can be annoying to fight against because of crowd control and unpredictable stability.

counters.counter_desc: Since Lou Yi does not have any dash to escape she is capable to be killed instantly with a one shot combo, Kagura is one prime example that will kill Lou Yi within a combo.

dominants.dominant_desc: Once level 4 use your ultimate to roam and help your team around. Make sure that your first and second skills were completely opposite for that yin and yang effect that the enemy find quite annoying.
dominants.dominant_title: Clear minion wave then roam around

emblems.emblem_desc: Flexible emblem is essential to Lou Yi To be able to conquer or survive an clash

equips.equip_desc: One Hit splash damage

hero.hero_overview: Luo yi adalah hero mage midlane yang memiliki mobilitas paling tinggi di game mlbb. Karena memiliki skill ultimate yang membantu kamu dan rekan setim berteleport kemanapun sesuai area jangkauan skill yang sangat luas. Sangat cocok digunakan untuk kalian yang suka bermain penyergapan atau serangan tiba-tiba tanpa diketahui oleh musuh
hero.hero_strength: Kekuatan utama dari Luo yi adalah skill pasif yin and yang. Dimana jika keduanya dicombokan, maka akan membuat musuh terkena efek stun. Sangat berguna jika melawan tipikal musuh yang menyerangan secara berdempetan
hero.hero_weakness: Kelemahan utama dari Lou yi adalah sangat lemah jika melawan tipikal musuh yang menyerangan berpencar, karena akan menurunkan tingkat efektifitas skill pasifnya. Selain itu, luo yi sangat bergantung dengan rumput sebagai tujuan teleportasi dari skill ultimatenya, untuk menyergap lawan. Karena skill ultimate nya memiliki kelemahan dimana ditempat tujuan teleportasi terdapat tanda segel bahwa luo yi akan teleport disana, dan pastinya musuh akan mengetahuinya

hero.hero_overview: Make and pock
hero.hero_strength: Team fight
hero.hero_weakness: Close combat

spell.spell_desc: To avoid close combat of fighter and assassin

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Tigreal's Ultimate is great for gathering enemies together, maximizing the control and damage of Luo Yi's skills when she follows up.

counters.counter_desc: Saber is a typical dive Assassin whose combo can instantly take Luo Yi out. Therefore, always be aware of Saber's position during teamfights.

dominants.dominant_desc: In the early laning phase, pay attention to enemy hero positions. Use Luo Yi's Skill 1 to hit Minions and the enemy hero at the same time, allowing her to clear waves while chipping away the enemy's health. Then, wait for a teammate before going in for a kill.

Check the minimap often to spot opportunities in the side lanes (e.g., enemies pushing Turrets or fleeing with low HP). In such situations, use your Ultimate to teleport to areas where the enemy has no vision (such as in bushes) and coordinate with your team for easy kills.

1. When leaving the Base, use Skill 1 to change the state of the skill to the opposite of her Skill 2. This allows for easy control on the enemy with a Skill 1 - Skill 2 combo.2. When facing enemies without escape abilities, first use Skill 1 on the enemy, then cast Skill 1 again without a target (to change its state). Follow up with Skill 2 then Skill 1 for two applications of crowd control.

emblems.emblem_desc: These Emblem Talents take advantage of the multiple charges of Luo Yi's Skill 1:1. Rupture provides Magic Penetration to increase her output.2. Bargain Hunter allows for faster equipment completion.3. Lethal Ignition works well with Luo Yi's multi-use skills to cause even more damage.

equips.equip_desc: Prioritize items that reduce skill cooldown to greatly enhance Luo Yi's ganking ability. Build standard Mage damage equipment later to increase her overall damage output. If survival becomes a concern, consider replacing the last item with Winter Crown or Immortality.

hero.hero_overview: Luo Yi possesses extremely powerful crowd control and support abilities. Her key features include high AOE damage, excellent group control capabilities, and a sneaky Ultimate that allows group teleportation. Against grouped-up enemies, her Skill 1 and Skill 2 can have devastating effects.
hero.hero_weakness: Luo Yi's disadvantages are a lack of mobility and surviability, making her an easy target for heroes who can quickly close in on her. Additionally, her skills need to be aimed, requiring a certain level of proficiency to use effectively.

spell.spell_desc: Equipping the Flicker Battle Spell will greatly enhance Luo Yi's survivability while also serving as an important way of initiating teamfights.
